name: Cassoulet-Lloyd Evans
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the beans.
2. Add water to cover and bring to a boil.
3. Boil 2 minutes, then remove from heat and cover.
4. Let stand for 1 hour.
5. Add salt, bring to a boil again and simmer for 1 1/2 hours until tender.
6. Fry the salt pork over low heat until golden.
7. Add lamb cubes and brown.
8. Add onions, carrots, tomatoes, garlic, parsley, rosemary, pepper, curry powder, and chicken broth.
9. Bring to a boil, then simmer for 30 minutes.
10. Drain the beans.
11. Place in an oven-safe pot or deep pan.
12. Pour meat and broth over beans and bake covered at 350°F for 30 minutes.
13. Remove lid and continue baking uncovered for 1 hour.
14. Top with bread crumbs and return to the oven, baking until the crumbs are golden brown.
Serves: 10
